steps.t: Spear-heads and spear-shafts have been hidden all over Bhol Rûdh. You should collect spear-heads and spear-shafts.
Spear-racks can be found in Bhol Rûdh, next to Dhôm-dhuga-Nôkh. You should assemble spears and place them on the spear-racks.
Dhôm-dhuga-Nôkh can be found in Bhol Rûdh. You should talk to Dhôm-dhuga-Nôkh.
